name: HERITAGE FINANCIAL CORP /WA/
business: Heritage Financial Corporation is a bank holding company whose primary business is commercial lending and deposit relationships with small- and medium-sized businesses and their owners, as well as attracting deposits from the general public. It also originates real estate construction and land development loans, consumer loans, and residential real estate loans. The company operates through its wholly-owned subsidiary Heritage Bank, headquartered in Olympia, Washington.

exposures.sentence: The federal banking agencies also have released specific risk management guidance on certain topics, including third-party relationships, in response to the proliferation of relationships between banking organizations and financial technology companies (although the guidance applies more broadly).
Regulatory guidance emphasizes that cybersecurity should be integrated into overall enterprise risk management and business continuity planning.
